calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2026 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2026 Continued To Jun-03-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Mar-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
David Scharf, Esq. 714-975-8281 Gravitas Law Group for Plaintiff.
Lauren Gibbs, Esq. 213-344-2418 Lein Migdal & Gibbs LLP for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.
Mr. Scharf contests and presents arguments; reconsider the TR, apprises the court of the agreement and timeline, cites Exhibit A on declaration.
Ms. Gibbs responds to Plaintiff's arguments; email and zoom calls; party is in Masachussetts; issues on jurisdiction, performance, no substantial connection, employment elsewhere.

After full argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendants Evan Zhao, Oddity Labs, LLC Oddity Tech Ltd's Motion to Quash Service of Summons.

Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
